Activity per minute

Chat Writing Delete typo Delete revision Pauses No action
Each bar shows the relative distribution of counted actions within that minute and is fully stacked whenever at least one action occurs. Gray means that no action was logged in that minute. Pauses are counted as gaps of at least 10 seconds between events.
Load a file to see activity per minute.

Codebook phases in the writing process

Orienting/Planning Directing AI response Pasting from chat Incorporating Drafting Revising Removing Reading/Monitoring
The codebook phases show the sequence and duration of segments. Clicking a segment opens the corresponding code for editing. Without screen or eye tracking, Reading/Monitoring remains a heuristic based on pauses and reception signals.
Load a file to segment process phases.
